title: Peking Flatbread Sticks with Spicy Dipping Sauce
description: Crispy flatbread sticks served with a spicy dipping sauce, a twist on traditional Chinese street food.
instructions: 2. Cut the flatbread into long, thin strips.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together vegetable oil, garlic, ginger, sambal oelek, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, and sesame oil.
4. Add the flatbread strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the dipping sauce.
5. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the flatbread strips in a single layer.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and sprinkle with chopped scallions.
8. Serve immediately with additional dipping sauce if desired.
